newsSince: No genuinely new material catalyst since June 9. The NVIDIA 800VDC/MGX collaboration and the GaNEXUS GaN portfolio launch were dated June 6 and June 10 respectively and were substantially captured in the June 9 verdicts. The GaNEXUS launch is marginally fresh but was pre-signaled and is largely a productization of the already-disclosed power-bottleneck narrative.

sources.label: onsemi collaborates with NVIDIA on 800 VDC power (onsemi)
onsemi launches GaNEXUS GaN power portfolio (Semiconductor Today, Jun 10)

verdicts.rankRationale: Residual-alpha-vs-passives lens: the NVIDIA 800VDC + GaNEXUS power-bottleneck evidence that drove the prior up-move is now public and partly priced; the GaNEXUS launch (Jun 10) is only marginally incremental. With no new flush and asymmetry vs peers unchanged, hold rank 35.
verdicts.bull: GaN/SiC power content in NVIDIA MGX/800VDC AI racks is a scarce, central power-delivery node.
verdicts.neutral: Real AI-power optionality but already re-rated; auto/industrial base still cyclical.
verdicts.bear: Power-bottleneck story now widely owned; residual alpha vs passives is thinning.

verdicts.rankRationale: AI-node bottleneck lens: the NVIDIA MGX/800VDC tie + GaNEXUS already lifted ON in the prior case as a directness upgrade. No new node-adjacency evidence since June 9; the directness gain is captured. ON remains analog/power, indirect to HBM/packaging. Hold 81.
verdicts.bull: MGX/800VDC ecosystem tie gives concrete AI-rack power adjacency.
verdicts.neutral: Power/analog exposure is real but a step removed from the AI-node bottleneck.
verdicts.bear: Less direct than HBM, advanced packaging and AI-networking names on this page.

verdicts.rankRationale: Co-packaged-optics lens: ON is power/SiC, not CPO. The June power news is orthogonal to optical interconnect, so it does not improve standing on this page. No new CPO-relevant evidence since June 9. Hold rank 84.
verdicts.bull: Power/SiC optionality for industrial AI buildout.
verdicts.neutral: Tangential to the co-packaged-optics thesis this page screens for.
verdicts.bear: Not CPO-focused; power news adds nothing through this specific lens.

verdicts.rankRationale: Under-owned-bottleneck master list: this page's thesis is power-delivery content, and the NVIDIA 800VDC + GaNEXUS evidence already drove the prior up-move. No genuinely new evidence since June 9; asymmetry vs peers is now neutral. Hold rank 71.
verdicts.bull: Direct power-delivery content into AI racks via MGX/800VDC.
verdicts.neutral: Solid power franchise but story now recognized; YTD +109% rich.
verdicts.bear: Execution and pricing in power semis; cyclical end-markets.
